label: Transparent stone buttes motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a cluster of desert stone buttes for a Morphous system named "Morphous Buttes", isolated full subject, no surrounding landscape, no props, no text.
Subject: three weathered sandstone buttes with flat caprock tops, vertical erosion grooves, ochre rock faces, warm clay ledges, cool blue-violet shadow planes, and a few small stone bases that read as one compact landscape motif.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the buttes, caprock, bases, or shadow edges. Keep the silhouette bold and instantly recognizable at small catalog size.
Lighting/mood: clean bright desert daylight, crisp material detail, spacious dashboard-system mood, natural ochre rock and cool shadow contrast.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no people, no plants, no animals, no sky, no clouds, no desert floor horizon, no UI, no text, no watermark, no decorative background, no second motif.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Buttes" derived from the visible transparent stone buttes motif.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the motif: ochre sandstone faces, burnt clay ledges, pale basin sand, clear sky cyan context, cool blue-violet shadow cuts, charcoal crevice ink, and horizontal caprock strata. This light board is the primary reference for coding a spacious dashboard system.
Canvas: exact 16:9 design board, 3840x2160 feel, high-resolution 4K-class source asset. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny token text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Buttes, motif story, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples with Geist and Noto Sans JP guidance for headings, body, labels, numerals, and compact dashboard annotations.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, left sidebar navigation, top filters, metric cards, line chart, bar chart, stacked area chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, and simple icon buttons.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise grid, spacious dashboard UI, 8px card radius, broad quiet surfaces, caprock header bars, sandstone-strata separators, subtle grain textures, strong scan-friendly hierarchy.
Color palette: warm off-white basin background, deep crevice ink text, ochre rock primary, sky cyan accent, cool shadow secondary, clay border, pale sand muted surfaces. Use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple gradients, no marketing hero layout, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Buttes", no illegible tiny text.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the visible "Morphous Buttes" design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent stone buttes motif and the visible light-mode Morphous Buttes board as references. Preserve the ochre sandstone palette roles, sky cyan context accents, cool shadow panels, caprock strata separators, spacious dashboard layout, Japanese typography guidance, and shadcn/tweakcn component coverage.
Canvas: exact 16:9 design board, 3840x2160 feel, high-resolution 4K-class source asset. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny token text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Buttes, Dark Mode, motif story, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Visual details: deep shadow-basin background, charcoal crevice surfaces, pale sand foreground text, ochre rock primary actions, sky cyan focus and chart accents, muted clay borders, blue-violet shadow cards, subtle sandstone grain overlays, crisp dashboard cards and controls.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, left sidebar navigation, top filters, metric cards, line chart, bar chart, stacked area chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, and simple icon buttons.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples with Geist and Noto Sans JP guidance.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no flat pure-black-only background, no generic purple gradients, no marketing hero layout, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Buttes", no illegible tiny text.
